title: The SEELE Scene in 20
wikitext:
[]: The SEELE Scene in 2.0 [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:29 am Did anyone else notice that the numbers of the pillars corresponded to what they were talking about? Pillars 04 and 05 were shown when they mentioned the losses of those two Evas. Immediately after talking about handing over Unit 03, Pillar 03 was displayed, and Pillar 01 was shown when the subject of Instrumentality came up. The only other pillar that I saw was 06, which appeared when they began to talk about the "Authentic Evangelion." Maybe it means something...?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:35 am pretty cool find. I just wished they hadn't taken the spookiness of the conference room away by showing that it was a green screen room the whole time...

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:41 am Axell wrote: I just wished they hadn't taken the spookiness of the conference room away by showing that it was a green screen room the whole time...

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:43 am actually, did you find this from watching the camrip with the new engrish subs or did you understand it? I'm hesitant to trust them from what i've heard. Of course its not too hard to pick out a few words to decipher what they're talking about

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:51 am Axell wrote: actually, did you find this from watching the camrip with the new engrish subs or did you understand it? I'm hesitant to trust them from what i've heard. Of course its not too hard to pick out a few words to decipher what they're talking about

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:04 am I mentioned it in the second viewing post that I made. In the original 2.0 spoiler thread.

[]:             Quote Post by TB3 » Mon Aug 03, 2009 6:53 am That's an impressive find, so maybe the Mark 6 is intended as the 'Authentic Evangelion'; since its being constructed outside of Nerv's control and is being piloted by SEELE's bishie-in-a-bottle, it stands to reason...hrm... And when I watched that scene with a friend, our reaction at the reveal of the green-screen was to say, ala Patrick Stewart "computer, end program" * Possibly Off Topic: Is it me or is SEELE constructing the Mark 6 by encasing the Tagbha Base's Lillith-like giant in Evangelion armour, or am I getting turned around by the vagueness of the camrip. If so, then (and apologies for applying NGE logic to ROE) might it be Adam himself, trussed up like a wolf in sheep's (Eva's?) clothing?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:18 pm Possibly Off Topic: Is it me or is SEELE constructing the Mark 6 by encasing the Tagbha Base's Lillith-like giant in Evangelion armour, or am I getting turned around by the vagueness of the camrip. If so, then (and apologies for applying NGE logic to ROE) might it be Adam himself, trussed up like a wolf in sheep's (Eva's?) clothing?

[]: Re: The SEELE Scene [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 04, 2009 10:55 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: the numbers of the pillars

[]:             Quote Post by AzureX » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:09 pm i was gonna flat out say that they could represent nerv locations this go around, but seeing as 04 had the "incident" in neveda(?) that detroyed the base(?) that doesnt work...
